title: vicia sativa subsp. cosentinii
intro: Vicia sativa subsp. cosentinii, also known as Italian vetch or cosentine vetch, is a subspecies of the common vetch plant (Vicia sativa) that is native to Europe and North Africa. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia sativa subsp. cosentinii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers and improve cognitive function. Vicia sativa subsp. cosentinii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
